zh.Milan, , Lombardy, Italy: 義大利隆巴迪亞米蘭諾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Elisabetta Visconti於1374年出生在義大利隆巴迪亞米蘭諾時，她的父親Barnabo di Visconti Signore di Milano Duke of Lombardy Duke of Lombardy51歲，母親Beatrice Regina Della Scala Lady of Milan43歲。她於1395年1月26日與Ernest of Bavaria-Munich在德國貝也藍德可萊斯 普法分霍分 安 德 易爾姆結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1432年2月2日在德國貝也藍德可萊斯 帕斯奧特姆明陳享年58歲，埋葬在德國貝也明陳。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elisabetta Visconti于1374年出生在意大利隆巴迪亞米蘭諾时，她的父亲Barnabo di Visconti Signore di Milano Duke of Lombardy Duke of Lombardy51岁，母亲Beatrice Regina Della Scala Lady of Milan43岁。她于1395年1月26日与Ernest of Bavaria-Munich在德国貝也藍德可萊斯 普法分霍分 安 德 易爾姆结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1432年2月2日在德国貝也藍德可萊斯 帕斯奧特姆明陳享年58岁，埋葬在德国貝也明陳。

nameMeanings.name: Visconti
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Salvatore, Pasquale, Rocco, Umberto, Amerigo, Angelo, Carlo, Domenic, Ennio, Gaetano, Gerlando, Gino.  French Laurent, Camille, Girard.

Italian: from visconte, a title of rank (medieval Latin vicecomes ‘deputy of a count’). Unusually (since most noble families took their surnames from their estates), the surname was sometimes of literal application, but without doubt it is also in part a nickname for someone who gave himself airs and graces, and in part a metonymic occupational name for someone in the employ of a viscount. This surname is also found in southern France.

variants.name: Viscomi
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Emilio, Salvatore, Antonio, Beniamino, Filomena, Mario, Rodolfo, Santo.
Italian: Sicilian and Calabrian form of Visconti , from medieval Latin viscomes ‘deputy’, Greek biskōmēs.

nameMeanings.name: Elisabetta
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Elizabeth
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Elisabetta Visconti was born in 1374, in Milan, Lombardy, Italy, her father, Barnabo di Visconti Signore di Milano Duke of Lombardy Duke of Lombardy, was 51 and her mother, Beatrice Regina Della Scala Lady of Milan, was 43. She married Ernest of Bavaria-Munich on 26 January 1395, in Pfaffenhofen, Bavaria, Germany. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 3 daughters. She died on 2 February 1432, in München, Hutthurm, Passau, Bavaria, Germany, at the age of 58, and was buried in Munich, Bavaria, Germany.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elisabetta Visconti est née en 1374, à Milano, Lombardia, Italie, son père, Barnabo di Visconti Signore di Milano Duke of Lombardy Duke of Lombardy, avait 51 ans et sa mère, Beatrice Regina Della Scala Lady of Milan, avait 43 ans. Elle a épousé Ernest of Bavaria-Munich le 26 janvier 1395, à Landkreis Pfaffenhofen an der Ilm, Bayern, Allemagne. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 2 février 1432, à München, Hutthurm, Landkreis Passau, Bayern, Allemagne, à l’âge de 58 ans, et a été enterrée à München, Bayern, Allemagne.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elisabetta Visconti 1374 in Milano, Lombardei, Italien geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Barnabo di Visconti Signore di Milano Duke of Lombardy Duke of Lombardy 51 und ihre Mutter Beatrice Regina Della Scala Lady of Milan 43. Sie hat am 26. Januar 1395 in Landkreis Pfaffenhofen an der Ilm, Bayern, Deutschland Ernest of Bavaria-Munich geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 2. Februar 1432 im Alter von 58 Jahren in München, Hutthurm, Landkreis Passau, Bayern, Deutschland und wurde in München, Bayern, Deutschland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elisabetta Visconti è nata il nel 1374 nel Milano, Lombardia, Italia, sua padre, Barnabo di Visconti Signore di Milano Duke of Lombardy Duke of Lombardy, aveva 51 anni e sua madre, Beatrice Regina Della Scala Lady of Milan, aveva 43 anni. Lei sposato Ernest of Bavaria-Munich il 26 gennaio 1395, nel Landkreis Pfaffenhofen an der Ilm, Bayern, Germania. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 3 figlie. Morì il 2 febbraio 1432, nel München, Hutthurm, Landkreis Passau, Bayern, Germania, all'età di 58 anni, e fu sepolta a München, Bayern, Germania.

ja.lifeSummary: Elisabetta Viscontiが1374年にイタリアロンバーディアミラノで生まれた時，父Barnabo di Visconti Signore di Milano Duke of Lombardy Duke of Lombardyは51歳，母Beatrice Regina Della Scala Lady of Milanは43歳であった。1395年1月26日にドイツバイエルンランドクレイス プファフエンhオフン アン ダー イルムでErnest of Bavaria-Munichと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1432年2月2日にドイツバイエルンランドクレイス プアッサウハットハルムムuンチェンで58歳で死去し，ドイツバイエルンムuンチェンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Elisabetta Visconti(이)가 1374년 이탈리아 롬바디아 미랜오에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Barnabo di Visconti Signore di Milano Duke of Lombardy Duke of Lombardy(은)는 51세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Beatrice Regina Della Scala Lady of Milan(은)는 43세였다. 그녀는 1395년 1월 26일 독일 베이른 랜드크레이스 파아펜호펜 앤 데르 이름에서 Ernest of Bavaria-Munich(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1432년 2월 2일 독일 베이른 랜드크레이스 파소 후스 u천에서 58세의 나이로 사망했으며 독일 베이른 u천에 묻혔다.

Ela casou-se com Ernest of Bavaria-Munich em 26 de janeiro de 1395, em Landkreis Pfaffenhofen an der Ilm, Bayern, Alemanha. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 3 filhas. ru.München, Hutthurm, Passau, Bavaria, Germ: мuнчэн, хуттурм, ландкрис пассау, беиирн, Германия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elisabetta Visconti родилась в 1374 г. в местности милано, ломбардя, Италия, её отцу по имени Barnabo di Visconti Signore di Milano Duke of Lombardy Duke of Lombardy было 51 год, а матери, которую звали Beatrice Regina Della Scala Lady of Milan, 43. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Ernest of Bavaria-Munich 26 января 1395 г. в местности ландкрис пфаффенофен ан дир илм, беиирн, Германия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 3 дочери. Она умерла 2 февраля 1432 г. в местности мuнчэн, хуттурм, ландкрис пассау, беиирн, Германия в возрасте 58 лет и была похоронена в местности мuнчэн, беиирн, Германия.

Se casó con Ernest of Bavaria-Munich el 26 de enero de 1395, en Landkreis Pfaffenhofen an der Ilm, Bayern, Alemania. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 3 hijas. Murió el 2 de febrero de 1432, en München, Hutthurm, Landkreis Passau, Bayern, Alemania, a la edad de 58 años, y fue sepultada en München, Bayern, Alemania.
